items.name: af-tokens
items.title: AF Brand Tokens
items.description: Canonical AF CSS tokens — Ink, Paper, Pulse + semantic glow/surface/border derivatives. Source: ~/.claude/skills/af-design-catalog/palettes/ink-paper-pulse.md

items.name: afvq-card-unified
items.title: AFVQ Card (Unified)
items.description: AF testimonial card — single unified frame containing left-aligned text + right-aligned video, AFVQ pulse-blue underglow tying both halves into one designed moment. Alternating left/right per row supported via the variant prop. Per af-brand-doctrine § 6.

items.name: iphone-chassis
items.title: iPhone Chassis
items.description: Reusable iPhone device-frame chassis for AF surfaces. Slot-based — content fills the screen; chassis renders frame, notch, status bar, side buttons. Variants: ink (Damian-canonical), paper. Sizes: compact, default, hero. immersive prop hides notch + status bar for full-bleed content. Lifted from zusammenarbeit.anfragenfluss.de chassis pattern per af-brand-doctrine "1:1 nachbauen" authority. preflight-device-mock skill MUST fire before real-surface use.

items.name: three-phase-iphone-hero
items.title: Three-Phase iPhone Hero
items.description: Narrative-arc orchestrator for AF Experience-Page surfaces. Documentary evidence → pivot question → future-self projection. Uses IntersectionObserver-based scroll-pivot to progress phases; pinned iPhone on desktop, stacked fallback on mobile. Phase 2 accepts string (canonical splash treatment) or ReactNode (custom). Must use 3 DIFFERENT mediums across phases per af-brand-doctrine § 2.

items.name: macbook-pro-chassis
items.title: MacBook Pro Chassis
items.description: Reusable MacBook Pro device-frame for AF surfaces — desktop-tier sibling to iphone-chassis. 16:10 lid + hinge + base strip. Variants: space-black (Apple Space Black #1D1D1F, correct for dark hero contexts), space-gray (Apple Space Gray #3A3A3C, neutral dark aluminum), silver (Apple Silver #D7D9DD, light/paper contexts). Context-aware lid shadow — paper-bg gets AFVQ ink-tinted shadow, dark-bg variants get neutral-black shadow per macbook-pro-m4-mockup.md §9. Sizes: compact (480px), default (560-640px), hero (720-880px), fluid (width-constrained at min(80vw, 1000px)). AF wallpaper fallback. Per Joe directive 2026-05-17: use Macs for desktop versions where useful, iPhone on mobile. preflight-device-mock skill MUST fire before real-surface use.

items.name: liquid-glass-frame
items.title: Liquid-Glass Frame
items.description: AF decorative chassis — multi-layer translucent frosted-glass material wrapping content (iPhone mocks, video frames, hero cards). 4-layer stack: transmission + frosting + edge highlights + AFVQ-blue underglow. Intensities: default, subtle, pulse-tinted. Status [damian-canon-needed] on exact blur/transmission stops — see ~/.claude/skills/af-design-catalog/PENDING-DAMIAN-VALIDATION.md. Applies on Experience-Page + Freigabe-Portal anchors only. Backdrop-filter is GPU-heavy — max ~3 per viewport.

items.name: af-platform-icons
items.title: AF Platform Icons
items.description: 8 platform brand icons as SVG components — WhatsApp, Gmail, FB, IG, Telegram, iMessage, Phone, Mail. Bundled exports + name-keyed map.

items.name: af-ios-notification
items.title: AF iOS Notification
items.description: iOS notification banner with Liquid-Glass container. Drops into iphone-chassis or standalone web/app surfaces.

items.name: whatsapp-chat
items.title: WhatsApp Chat
items.description: WhatsApp chat content surface — authentic visual contract (teal #008069 header, #D9FDD3 outgoing bubbles, #ECE5DD background pattern) so the medium is instantly recognizable. Slots into iphone-chassis (immersive + wallpaper='none') for testimonial / lead-conversation embeds per af-brand-doctrine 'WhatsApp-as-trust-medium' pattern. Composable sub-parts exported: WhatsAppHeader, WhatsAppBubble, WhatsAppDaySeparator, WhatsAppTypingIndicator, WhatsAppInputBar, WhatsAppVoiceMessage. Receipt states (sent/delivered/read) + voice-message + typing indicator supported.

items.name: reels-feed
items.title: Reels Feed
items.description: Vertical-video content surface modeling Instagram Reels / TikTok / YouTube Shorts. Full-bleed media layer + black background + right-rail action stack (like / comment / share / save / more + creator avatar + spinning music disc) + bottom info zone (creator handle / Folgen button / caption / music attribution). Count formatter (1.2K / 12.4K / 1.2M) matches platform conventions. Slots into iphone-chassis (immersive + wallpaper='none') for Experience-Page hero embeds. Includes AfGradientReel fallback media component for use when no real video is available.

items.name: email-inbox
items.title: Email Inbox
items.description: iOS Mail-styled inbox list for AF iPhone-chassis embeds. White background + Apple system blue (#007AFF) unread dots + system-font typography + section dividers (Heute / Gestern / Letzte Woche) + email list items with sender avatar, subject, preview, time, thread count, flag, star. Optional search bar + filter chips + last-updated footer. Composable sub-parts exported: EmailHeader, EmailListItem, EmailSearchBar, EmailFilterRow, EmailSectionDivider. Slots into iphone-chassis (immersive + wallpaper='none') for lead-flow / pipeline demonstrations.

items.name: instagram-profile
items.title: Instagram Profile
items.description: Instagram profile page for AF iPhone-chassis embeds. Verified-blue badge (#0095F6), follow/message buttons, 3-stat row (Posts/Followers/Following), bio + category + website, story highlights row with gradient covers, tab bar (Posts/Reels/Tagged), 3-column post grid with Reel/Carousel indicators. Two modes: own-profile (Profil bearbeiten + Profil teilen) and viewing-other-profile (Folgen + Nachricht). Slots into iphone-chassis (immersive + wallpaper='none') for AF brand-presence demonstrations on Experience-Page surfaces.

items.name: use-reduced-motion
items.title: useReducedMotion
items.description: React hook — subscribes to the OS-level `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` media query and returns true when the user has asked the system to minimize non-essential animation. Shared dependency of every AF Werkschau animation primitive (SwipeIn, ScrollReveal, NotificationArrive, PressLike). WCAG 2.2 SC 2.3.3 compliance. SSR-safe (returns false on server).

items.name: swipe-in
items.title: Swipe In
items.description: Animation primitive — wraps any element to swipe in from a direction (left/right/up/down) on mount. Plays once by default; replayable via replayKey. Configurable distance, duration, delay, easing. Modular: HOC-style, composes with any child. Sibling to ScrollReveal (scroll-triggered) and NotificationArrive (drop-from-top spring). Honors `prefers-reduced-motion`. Use for staggered list reveals, hero entrances, WhatsApp message arrivals.

items.name: scroll-reveal
items.title: Scroll Reveal
items.description: Animation primitive — wraps any element to fade + slide in when scrolled into view. IntersectionObserver-based; fires once by default, optionally replays on every re-enter. Configurable from-direction (left/right/up/down), distance, threshold, rootMargin, duration, delay, easing. The workhorse for long-form kundenstimmen / Fallstudien pages. Modular: HOC-style, composes with any child. Sibling to SwipeIn and NotificationArrive. Honors `prefers-reduced-motion`.

items.name: notification-arrive
items.title: Notification Arrive
items.description: Animation primitive — drop-from-top (iOS) OR slide-from-right (macOS) with spring settle (mild overshoot). Wraps a notification banner (af-ios-notification, macos-notification-banner, liquid-glass-frame) to give it the canonical 'ding!' arrival motion: enters from the FROM edge + scales slightly + settles. New `direction='top' | 'right'` prop (default 'top') selects iOS vs macOS axis — same spring math, same overshoot, axis flips per platform. Distinct from SwipeIn because of the spring overshoot — that's what makes it FEEL like a real notification. Used for kundenstimmen pages showing real notifications from leads / customers arriving in real time. Modular: HOC-style, composes with any child. Honors `prefers-reduced-motion`.

items.name: press-like
items.title: Press Like
items.description: Instagram-canon heart-bounce like button. Press scales the heart 1.32×, flips to red (#ED4956), and settles with a spring overshoot — the bounce is what makes the interaction feel real. Supports controlled + uncontrolled state, three sizes (compact / default / large), optional count display (short '1.2K / 12.4K / 1.2M' or full localized), custom colors. Used inside YoutubePlayer's like button + ReelsFeed action rail. Reduced-motion users skip the scale-burst — the color flip is the state confirmation.

items.name: typewriter-rotator
items.title: Typewriter Rotator
items.description: Animation primitive — cycles through a list of phrases, typing each one character-by-character with a blinking cursor, pausing, deleting, then typing the next. Inline span — drops into any headline to give it a rotating dynamic line that demonstrates multiple value propositions without taking up vertical space. Classic AF landing-page hero pattern. Per af-brand-doctrine: the rotation across Handwerk types is a RELATE-module signal — AF serves breadth, not one persona. Anti-Orthodoxy vs lead portals that funnel a single offering. Used by kundenstimmen-page hero headline. Configurable typing/deleting speed, pause durations, cursor character + blink rate, loop on/off. ARIA-live='polite' for screen readers.

items.name: youtube-player
items.title: YouTube Player
items.description: Full YouTube watch-page UI. 16:9 player frame + scrubber bar with red progress + play/pause + fullscreen + duration display + title + channel row with subscribe button + action bar (like via PressLike + share) + description block + optional recommendations rail. Two layouts: 'embed' (compact, fits iPhone-chassis) and 'desktop' (player + 380px recommendations rail, fits MacBook-chassis). Includes AfYoutubeGradientPoster fallback when no real video poster is available. Composable: video-frame is a slot, recommendations are passed as data.

items.name: kundenstimmen-page
items.title: Kundenstimmen Page (Auto-Generator)
items.description: The auto-page generator for AF customer-story pages. Takes a single KundenstimmenPageData object (customer name, before/after metrics, stats, WhatsApp testimonial messages, optional YouTube case study, pull quote, social-proof notifications, CTA) and emits a complete brand-consistent kundenstimmen page. Composes every primitive in the AF Werkschau library: iphone-chassis + macbook-pro-chassis + whatsapp-chat + af-ios-notification + scroll-reveal + typewriter-rotator + press-like + youtube-player. No template changes needed for new customers — feed in their data, get their page out. The realization of the AF Werkschau north star: one generator, infinite pages.
